creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
I can't update chromium from 13.0.782.220 to 14.0.835.163_1


[root@timbsd /usr/ports/www/chromium]# make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for chromium-14.0.835.163_1:
     CODECS=off "Compile and enable patented codecs like H.264"
     GCONF=on "Use GConf2 for preferences"
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
